name: Sumeet Satish Boob
headline: AI Transformation & Delivery Leader | PMP®
summary: AI Transformation & Delivery Leader (PMP®) with nearly 20 years of experience leading global engineering organizations, enterprise transformation programs, and AI-enabled modernization initiatives across BFSI, Healthcare, Retail, and Telecom domains.
highlights: Directed $12M+ cross-regional portfolios with full delivery ownership and executive stakeholder engagement.
Scaled 60+ FTE global engineering teams across India, Romania, and the U.S.
Spearheaded Agile, SAFe, and DevSecOps transformation initiatives delivering 30%+ productivity gains.
Reduced client escalations by 50% through strengthened governance frameworks.

experience.title: Senior Software Development Manager
responsibilities: Led strategic transformation initiatives across healthcare and retail accounts enabling platform modernization and operational scalability.
Partnered with client leadership teams to define roadmap initiatives aligned to digital transformation goals.
Drove AI-assisted engineering productivity initiatives using GitHub Copilot and automation accelerators.
Directed a 60+ FTE global engineering organization delivering a $3M+ portfolio with full P&L accountability.
Strengthened executive governance cadence across client leadership, reducing escalations by 50%.
Awarded Employee of the Quarter twice for exceptional project delivery.

experience.title: AVP, Technology & DevOps Manager
responsibilities: Led globally distributed engineering and DevOps operations across 4 delivery tracks with 18-member cross-functional teams.
Managed enterprise liquidity and treasury platform delivery across Java, WebSphere, and SQL ecosystems.
Directed DevSecOps governance and compliance initiatives including Blackduck, Checkmarx, Sonar, and Contrast.
Automated enterprise deployment workflows reducing build and deployment effort by 32% across Citi LMS operations.
Led modernization initiatives enabling migration from legacy architecture to microservices-based platforms.
Received Quarterly Gold Award for implementing one-click deployment automation improving deployment efficiency by 25%.

experience.title: Technology Lead
responsibilities: Led managed services delivery for 32 enterprise insurance clients across globally distributed engagement models.
Managed 2 Agile delivery pods comprising developers and QA engineers, overseeing end-to-end lifecycle execution.
Acted as Scrum Master and Delivery Lead driving sprint governance, stakeholder communication, and delivery planning.
Twice recognized as Employee of the Month for high-impact project execution.

experience.title: Development Lead
responsibilities: Led development teams building mission-critical payment processing modules for Western Union.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed energy products for SunGard clients including British Petroleum (BP).

education.institution: Welingkar Institute of Management, Mumbai University

education.degree: Master of Engineering in Computer Science
education.institution: Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune University
